mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apl (supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, apl_Amount) VALUES (#{supermarketId}, #{commodityId}, #{amount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE apl_Amount = VALUES(apl_Amount)
mapper.update: INSERT INTO allapl (commodity_Id, allapl_Amount) SELECT commodity_Id, SUM(apl_Amount) FROM apl GROUP BY commodity_Id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE allapl_Amount = VALUES(allapl_Amount)
mapper.select: SELECT supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, apl_Amount, apl_Time FROM apl
SELECT supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, apl_Amount, apl_Time FROM apl WHERE commodity_Id = #{commodityId}
